meta.note: Faithful, extractive summaries; every item links to its original source.

items.headline: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
items.summary: As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among US companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch.

items.headline: Substack’s new tool tells you who’s been writing their newsletters with AI
items.summary: Substack is giving readers a way to estimate how much of a newsletter was written by AI, signaling a broader shift toward transparency around AI-assisted content.

items.headline: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
items.summary: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.

items.headline: Amazon cuts jobs in its artificial general intelligence group
items.summary: 5 points and 1 comments on Hacker News.

items.headline: AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic
items.summary: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday. As part of the new partnership, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of…

items.headline: Accelerating the frontiers of scientific discovery: Google’s $40M commitment to the Genesis Mission
items.summary: Google commits $40M in AI tokens and credits for the Genesis Mission

items.headline: Unlimited AI tokens aren't unlimited after all as US Army burns through supply
items.summary: Troops received an email informing them that they were rapidly depleting their AI tokens.

items.headline: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
items.summary: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

items.headline: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
items.summary: Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

items.headline: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
items.summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

items.headline: The Download: NASA’s new space telescope and OpenAI’s autonomous hacker
items.summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Shape-shifting mirrors on NASA’s new space telescope could unveil Jupiters like our own When NASA’s…

items.headline: Advancing the next era of national science
items.summary: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.

items.headline: Meta made its own AI detection system. It should have just used Google’s
items.summary: IIn March, Meta's Oversight Board called on the company to "meet its public commitments and employ its own tools" to help quell the spread of deceptive generative AI content across platforms. Meta responded in July by introducing Content…

items.headline: Utility companies promise to spare us from AI’s energy bill
items.summary: In the face of backlash to concerns the AI boom will increase consumer electricity bills, the largest utility companies and data center developers in the US are now promising to do something about it. The Wall Street Journal reports that…

items.headline: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
items.summary: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.

items.headline: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
items.summary: Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an interactive enterprise training platform where employees practice workplace conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback, scoring, and analytics to help companies measure training…

items.headline: Introducing OpenAI Presence
items.summary: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.
